illluck: Cutting is the mother of Go
illluck: but you need to internalize when cuts are good
illluck: easiest rule of thumb which is not always right is that if both sides of a cut are not strong after the cut it's good
illluck: if only one side is weak it's situational
illluck: and if both sides are strong after a cut the cut is bad
illluck: It's always a pendulum -> play safe -> lose by points -> play aggressive -> die -> play safe...
illluck: personally for learning I'd recommend erring on the side of aggression
